Flow.description: Update in Group By formulas ALN-293: Added in decision outcome for Allowance Hours. ALN-333: Added in formula to update the pay code based on it being Weekday or Weekend/PH. ALN-293: Stamping WFM Contract from Shift to Allowance Pay Transactions ALN-481: Remove reference to Min Engagement apex to prevent duplication of PTIX ALN-479 - Added clause to NOT include Custom Rules with Allowance Payment Frequency of Allowance Hours in the Get Custom Rules element

formulas.name: frmContractInvoiceGroupBy
formulas.expression: CASE( TEXT({!$Record.tc9_et__Assignment__r.tc9_ext_sirint__Job_Role__r.sirenum__Account__r.Custom_Invoice_Group_By__c}), "Account & Site", {!$Record.tc9_et__Assignment__r.tc9_pr__Client__c} + "_" + {!Loop_Shifts_for_Contract.sirenum__Site__c}, "Contract & Site", {!Loop_Shifts_for_Contract.sirenum__Contract__c} + "_" + {!Loop_Shifts_for_Contract.sirenum__Site__c}, "Contract", {!Loop_Shifts_for_Contract.sirenum__Contract__c}, "Site", {!Loop_Shifts_for_Contract.sirenum__Site__c}, "Site & Employee", {!Loop_Shifts_for_Contract.sirenum__Site__c} + "_" + {!Loop_Shifts_for_Contract.sirenum__Contact__c}, "Location", {!Loop_Shifts_for_Contract.sirenum__Location__c}, "Location & Employee", {!Loop_Shifts_for_Contract.sirenum__Location__c} + "_" + {!Loop_Shifts_for_Contract.sirenum__Contact__c}, "Location & Job Type", {!Loop_Shifts_for_Contract.sirenum__Location__c} + "_" + {!Loop_Shifts_for_Contract.Minimum_Pay_Rate__c}, "Branch", {!Loop_Shifts_for_Contract.Branch__c}, "Job Type", {!Loop_Shifts_for_Contract.sirenum__Team__c}, "Award Classification", {!Loop_Shifts_for_Contract.tc9_ext_sirint__Award_Classification__c}, "Award Level", {!Loop_Shifts_for_Contract.tc9_ext_sirint__Award_Level__c}, "" )

formulas.name: frmJobRoleInvoiceGroupBy
formulas.expression: CASE( TEXT({!$Record.tc9_et__Assignment__r.tc9_ext_sirint__Job_Role__r.sirenum__Account__r.Custom_Invoice_Group_By__c}), "Account & Site", {!$Record.tc9_et__Assignment__r.tc9_pr__Client__c} + "_" + {!Loop_Shifts_for_Site.sirenum__Site__c}, "Contract & Site", {!Loop_Shifts_for_Job_Role.sirenum__Contract__c} + "_" + {!Loop_Shifts_for_Job_Role.sirenum__Site__c}, "Contract", {!Loop_Shifts_for_Job_Role.sirenum__Contract__c}, "Site", {!Loop_Shifts_for_Job_Role.sirenum__Site__c}, "Site & Employee", {!Loop_Shifts_for_Job_Role.sirenum__Site__c} + "_" + {!Loop_Shifts_for_Job_Role.sirenum__Contact__c}, "Location", {!Loop_Shifts_for_Job_Role.sirenum__Location__c}, "Location & Employee", {!Loop_Shifts_for_Job_Role.sirenum__Location__c} + "_" + {!Loop_Shifts_for_Job_Role.sirenum__Contact__c}, "Location & Job Type", {!Loop_Shifts_for_Job_Role.sirenum__Location__c} + "_" + {!Loop_Shifts_for_Job_Role.Minimum_Pay_Rate__c}, "Branch", {!Loop_Shifts_for_Job_Role.Branch__c}, "Job Type", {!Loop_Shifts_for_Job_Role.sirenum__Team__c}, "Award Classification", {!Loop_Shifts_for_Job_Role.tc9_ext_sirint__Award_Classification__c}, "Award Level", {!Loop_Shifts_for_Job_Role.tc9_ext_sirint__Award_Level__c}, "" )

formulas.name: frmLocationInvoiceGroupBy
formulas.expression: CASE( TEXT({!$Record.tc9_et__Assignment__r.tc9_ext_sirint__Job_Role__r.sirenum__Account__r.Custom_Invoice_Group_By__c}), "Account & Site", {!$Record.tc9_et__Assignment__r.tc9_pr__Client__c} + "_" + {!Loop_Shifts_for_Location.sirenum__Site__c} + "_" + {!$Record.tc9_et__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "Contract & Site", {!Loop_Shifts_for_Location.sirenum__Contract__c} + "_" + {!Loop_Shifts_for_Location.sirenum__Site__c} + "_" + {!$Record.tc9_et__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "Contract", {!Loop_Shifts_for_Location.sirenum__Contract__c} + "_" + {!$Record.tc9_et__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "Site", {!Loop_Shifts_for_Location.sirenum__Site__c} + "_" + {!$Record.tc9_et__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "Site & Employee", {!Loop_Shifts_for_Location.sirenum__Site__c} + "_" + {!Loop_Shifts_for_Location.sirenum__Contact__c} + "_" + {!$Record.tc9_et__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "Location", {!Loop_Shifts_for_Location.sirenum__Location__c} + "_" + {!$Record.tc9_et__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "Location & Employee", {!Loop_Shifts_for_Location.sirenum__Location__c} + "_" + {!Loop_Shifts_for_Location.sirenum__Contact__c} + "_" + {!$Record.tc9_et__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "Location & Job Type", {!Loop_Shifts_for_Location.sirenum__Location__c} + "_" + {!Loop_Shifts_for_Location.Minimum_Pay_Rate__c} + "_" + {!$Record.tc9_et__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "Branch", {!Loop_Shifts_for_Location.Branch__c} + "_" + {!$Record.tc9_et__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "Job Type", {!Loop_Shifts_for_Location.sirenum__Team__c} + "_" + {!$Record.tc9_et__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "Award Classification", {!Loop_Shifts_for_Location.tc9_ext_sirint__Award_Classification__c} + "_" + {!$Record.tc9_et__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "Award Level", {!Loop_Shifts_for_Location.tc9_ext_sirint__Award_Level__c} + "_" + {!$Record.tc9_et__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "" )

formulas.name: frmRecord
formulas.expression: IF( NOT(ISBLANK({!Loop_Custom_Rules.Contract__c})),"WFM Contract - " & {!Loop_Custom_Rules.Contract__r.Name} & " (" & {!Loop_Custom_Rules.Contract__c} & ")", IF( NOT(ISBLANK({!Loop_Custom_Rules.Job_Role__c})),"Job Role - " &{!Loop_Custom_Rules.Job_Role__r.Name} & " (" & {!Loop_Custom_Rules.Job_Role__c} & ")", IF( NOT(ISBLANK({!Loop_Custom_Rules.Site__c})),"Site - " &{!Loop_Custom_Rules.Site__r.Name} & " (" & {!Loop_Custom_Rules.Site__c} & ")", IF( NOT(ISBLANK({!Loop_Custom_Rules.Location__c})),"Location - " & {!Loop_Custom_Rules.Location__r.Name} & " (" & {!Loop_Custom_Rules.Location__c} & ")", IF( NOT(ISBLANK({!Loop_Custom_Rules.Shift__c})),"Shift - " &{!Loop_Custom_Rules.Shift__r.Name} & " (" & {!Loop_Custom_Rules.Shift__c} & ")","" )))))

formulas.name: frmShiftInvoiceGroupBy
formulas.expression: CASE( TEXT({!$Record.tc9_et__Assignment__r.tc9_ext_sirint__Job_Role__r.sirenum__Account__r.Custom_Invoice_Group_By__c}), "Account & Site", {!$Record.tc9_et__Assignment__r.tc9_pr__Client__c} + "_" + {!Loop_Shifts_for_Shift.sirenum__Site__c} + "_" + {!$Record.tc9_et__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "Contract & Site", {!Loop_Shifts_for_Shift.sirenum__Contract__c} + "_" + {!Loop_Shifts_for_Shift.sirenum__Site__c} + "_" + {!$Record.tc9_et__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "Contract", {!Loop_Shifts_for_Shift.sirenum__Contract__c} + "_" + {!$Record.tc9_et__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "Site", {!Loop_Shifts_for_Shift.sirenum__Site__c} + "_" + {!$Record.tc9_et__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "Site & Employee", {!Loop_Shifts_for_Shift.sirenum__Site__c} + "_" + {!Loop_Shifts_for_Shift.sirenum__Contact__c} + "_" + {!$Record.tc9_et__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "Location", {!Loop_Shifts_for_Shift.sirenum__Location__c} + "_" + {!$Record.tc9_et__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "Location & Employee", {!Loop_Shifts_for_Shift.sirenum__Location__c} + "_" + {!Loop_Shifts_for_Shift.sirenum__Contact__c} + "_" + {!$Record.tc9_et__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "Location & Job Type", {!Loop_Shifts_for_Shift.sirenum__Location__c} + "_" + {!Loop_Shifts_for_Shift.Minimum_Pay_Rate__c} + "_" + {!$Record.tc9_et__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "Branch", {!Loop_Shifts_for_Shift.Branch__c} + "_" + {!$Record.tc9_et__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "Job Type", {!Loop_Shifts_for_Shift.sirenum__Team__c} + "_" + {!$Record.tc9_et__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "Award Classification", {!Loop_Shifts_for_Shift.tc9_ext_sirint__Award_Classification__c} + "_" + {!$Record.tc9_et__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "Award Level", {!Loop_Shifts_for_Shift.tc9_ext_sirint__Award_Level__c} + "_" + {!$Record.tc9_et__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "" )

formulas.name: frmSiteInvoiceGroupBy
formulas.expression: CASE( TEXT({!$Record.tc9_et__Assignment__r.tc9_ext_sirint__Job_Role__r.sirenum__Account__r.Custom_Invoice_Group_By__c}), "Account & Site", {!$Record.tc9_et__Assignment__r.tc9_pr__Client__c} + "_" + {!Loop_Shifts_for_Site.sirenum__Site__c}, "Contract & Site", {!Loop_Shifts_for_Site.sirenum__Contract__c} + "_" + {!Loop_Shifts_for_Site.sirenum__Site__c}, "Contract", {!Loop_Shifts_for_Site.sirenum__Contract__c}, "Site", {!Loop_Shifts_for_Site.sirenum__Site__c}, "Site & Employee", {!Loop_Shifts_for_Site.sirenum__Site__c} + "_" + {!Loop_Shifts_for_Site.sirenum__Contact__c}, "Location", {!Loop_Shifts_for_Site.sirenum__Location__c} + "_" + {!$Record.tc9_et__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "Location & Employee", {!Loop_Shifts_for_Site.sirenum__Location__c} + "_" + {!Loop_Shifts_for_Site.sirenum__Contact__c} + "_" + {!$Record.tc9_et__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "Location & Job Type", {!Loop_Shifts_for_Site.sirenum__Location__c} + "_" + {!Loop_Shifts_for_Site.Minimum_Pay_Rate__c} + "_" + {!$Record.tc9_et__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "Branch", {!Loop_Shifts_for_Site.Branch__c} + "_" + {!$Record.tc9_et__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "Job Type", {!Loop_Shifts_for_Site.sirenum__Team__c} + "_" + {!$Record.tc9_et__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "Award Classification", {!Loop_Shifts_for_Site.tc9_ext_sirint__Award_Classification__c} + "_" + {!$Record.tc9_et__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "Award Level", {!Loop_Shifts_for_Site.tc9_ext_sirint__Award_Level__c} + "_" + {!$Record.tc9_et__Assignment__r.Payroll_Invoice_Setting_ID__c}, "" )

Flow.label: Timesheet Post Processing Updates

recordLookups.name: Get_Custom_Rules
recordLookups.label: Get Custom Rules
recordLookups.filterLogic: 6 AND 7 AND 10 AND 11 AND 12 AND 13 AND (8 OR 9) AND (1 OR 2 OR 3 OR 4 OR 5)

recordLookups.description: Gets a Pay Transaction processed by the IR Engine to use defaults for the Daily/Weekly Allowances.
recordLookups.name: Get_Pay_Transaction
recordLookups.label: Get Pay Transaction

recordLookups.description: Gets the Allowance Record Type to be used when creating the Pay Transactions.
recordLookups.name: Get_Record_Type
recordLookups.label: Get Record Type
